response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and demonstrable exposure to agentic workflows and event-driven systems, but lacks clear evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech environments, scaling engineering teams to 30+, or designing multi-agent architectures with financial risk constraints — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at Naver
Proven track record in event-driven systems and real-time data platforms (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture practices: TDD, CI/CD, and technical mentoring through workshops and open source
concerns: No explicit experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance systems
Lacks documented leadership of teams beyond 10–15 engineers or formal technical leadership roles
No evidence of designing model-agnostic, auditable multi-agent frameworks with feedback loops for financial decisioning
